skill_execution.question: Compare HAM vs LEC through Turn 3

sql:
WITH DriverNumbers AS (
    SELECT
        driver_number,
        name_acronym
    FROM
        f1_data_library_DS.driver_mapping_2026
    WHERE
        name_acronym IN ('HAM', 'LEC')
),
FastestLapsPerDriver AS (
    SELECT
        cts.driver_number,
        cts.lap_number,
        cts.lap_duration,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cts.driver_number ORDER BY cts.lap_duration ASC) as rn
    FROM
        f1_data_library_DS.corner_telemetry_sequences AS cts
    WHERE
        cts.season = 2026
        AND cts.event_name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
        AND cts.session_type = 'Q'
        AND cts.driver_number IN (SELECT driver_number FROM DriverNumbers)
        AND cts.corner_number = 3
    GROUP BY
        cts.driver_number,
        cts.lap_number,
        cts.lap_duration
)
SELECT
    dn.name_acronym AS driver_code,
    cts.lap_number,
    ROUND(cts.distance_from_apex, 2) AS distance_from_apex_m,
    ROUND(cts.speed, 1) AS speed_kmh,
    ROUND(cts.throttle, 2) AS throttle_percent,
    CAST(cts.brake AS INT64) AS brake_applied,
    cts.gear,
    ROUND(cts.rpm, 0) AS rpm
FROM
    f1_data_library_DS.corner_telemetry_sequences AS cts
JOIN
    FastestLapsPerDriver AS flpd
    ON cts.driver_number = flpd.driver_number
    AND cts.lap_number = flpd.lap_number
JOIN
    DriverNumbers AS dn
    ON cts.driver_number = dn.driver_number
WHERE
    flpd.rn = 1
    AND cts.season = 2026
    AND cts.event_name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
    AND cts.session_type = 'Q'
    AND cts.corner_number = 3
ORDER BY
    dn.name_acronym,
    cts.distance_from_apex
LIMIT 50;
